meta.mission: Mobile-optimized responsive pass: 4 fixes incl. critical Plan-tab regression. See NIGHT_SHIFT_MOBILE_SPEC.md.

tasks.title: Reorder chapter sections — study guide above videos
tasks.description: In index.html, within every chapter .block (#ch-21 through #ch-26 and #ch-rust), move .study-guide-toggle + .study-guide-container + .paper-guide-container to BEFORE .resources-grid. SOTA container stays last.

tasks.title: Fix nav overflow on narrow viewports
tasks.description: Rework responsive behaviour of .nav. On <768px: chapter tabs become horizontally scrollable with scroll-snap + fade gradient. Hamburger controls only .nav-right (view toggle, lexicon, pomodoro, progress). Search input full-width when expanded. All touch targets >= 44px. Tabs always reachable on 375px via horizontal scroll.

tasks.title: CRITICAL: Plan tab not rendering
tasks.description: User reports Plan tab renders empty. Root-cause: check plan.js load order, PLAN.init() invocation, window.PLAN availability at nav click, sessions.json fetch path, console errors. Fix and verify grid visible with 75 cells.

tasks.title: Full responsive audit + fixes on 375/430/768/1024
tasks.description: Puppeteer QA on 4 breakpoints x ~10 views. Fix overflow, touch targets <44px, small fonts, broken grids. Plan grid stacks vertical on narrow. Pomodoro stacks clean. Search shrinks. Modals fit viewport.

functional_verification.method: Puppeteer QA on 4 breakpoints + visual inspection of every chapter tab
functional_verification.evidence: Puppeteer QA at 375/430/768/1024/1440: all 11 tabs render without overflow. Hamburger toggles nav-right cleanly at <900px. Study guide appears above resources-grid in every chapter. Plan tab shows 75 sessions + legend. Touch targets >= 44px. Day-tabs horizontally scrollable at all viewports with gradient fade.

decisions.decision: Horizontal scroll + snap for chapter tabs on mobile, hamburger for nav-right only
decisions.reason: Keeping tabs inline-scrollable preserves discoverability of current chapter and avoids a two-click hamburger-to-tab flow on every nav change. Hamburger hides only secondary controls (timer, progress, view toggle).

decisions.decision: Study guide moves above .resources-grid (which contains videos), not interleaved
decisions.reason: Videos are mixed with readings inside resources-grid. Splitting them would require ch-by-ch DOM surgery. Moving the guide above the whole resources block is cleanest and matches user intent (guide as primary content).
